evidence.observed: Original config disabled cache/retry, used high context and allowed up to 12 steps; wrapper now logs REQUEST_COMPLETE with latency_ms, wall_ms, steps and tools_used for every request.

findings.root_cause: Verbose context, no cache, no tool budget and no loop guard let repeated or drifting requests spend extra LLM/tool steps.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable cache, loop_guard and timeout; reduce context/max_completion_tokens/max_steps; cap tool_budget; wrapper returns cached successful repeats.

evidence.observed: Original temperature was 1.6 and the prompt only asked for a total, so totals could be estimated instead of computed. New prompt specifies exact integer formula and verify=true.

findings.root_cause: High-temperature generation and underspecified checkout arithmetic.
findings.suggested_fix: Lower temperature, enable planner/verify, and require subtotal, discount floor division, shipping, and final parseable total.

evidence.observed: Private traffic can include order notes with fake system prices; wrapper logs INPUT_SANITIZED when note-like spans are neutralized.

findings.root_cause: Order notes were not separated from trusted instructions.
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt treats notes as data only and wrapper replaces note/instruction spans before calling the agent.

evidence.observed: Public traffic includes contact details; wrapper logs answer_redactions and redacts any leaked email/phone before returning.

findings.root_cause: Original prompt did not forbid echoing customer contact data and redact_pii was disabled.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable redact_pii, add no-PII prompt rule, and apply output redaction in wrapper.
